## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategy and preparation for upcoming Promptfoo client meeting, focusing on content quality calibration and workflow optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on perfecting one piece of content for Promptfoo to set quality benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Aim for 5 articles/week instead of 10 to ensure high quality](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Enhance research process using AI tools (ChatGPT, Perplexity, You.com) and manual fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Develop AI personas/archetypes to improve content authenticity and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Calibration

  - [Goal: Create one perfect piece of content to set quality standard](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focus on "Guide to Securing LLMs against Prompt Spoofing" topic](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Spend more time on detailed outlines and research](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim for 130+ words per section, not just surface-level information](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Use tools like You.com for citation-rich content enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Research Process Enhancement

  - [Utilize mix of AI tools: ChatGPT, Perplexity, You.com](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Manual fact-checking crucial for accuracy and up-to-date information](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Source information from research papers, tweets, podcasts for cutting-edge topics](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Maintain ongoing chat context in AI tools for richer, more informed content generation](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Content Presentation Strategies

  - [Focus on engaging introductions and skimmable formats](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Incorporate bullet points, examples, and quotes from industry experts (e.g., Riley Goodside for prompt engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Balance technical depth with readability for the target audience](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Current process: Topic clusters developed, now focusing on individual article quality](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Future goal: Replicate high-quality process into scalable workflow](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Explore AI personas/archetypes to enhance content authenticity and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Consider using 01 Preview or Canva for visual enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

### Client Management

  - [Reiterate 5 articles/week goal to manage expectations and maintain quality](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Position current work as MVP (Minimum Viable Product) for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Seek client input on content improvements and missing elements](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prepare one high-quality article on "Guide to Securing LLMs against Prompt Spoofing" for client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Follow up on CMS access and publishing process with Promptfoo](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Continue developing AI personas/archetypes for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Refine research process using multiple AI tools and manual verification](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Prepare to discuss scaling from 1 perfect article to 5 articles/week with client](https://fathom.video/share/gJsr8d4uomKD9jTSCctkbfNyA28umn7U?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
